properties.label: LiveCode UI elements appear in lists of stacks
properties.name: Show Revolution Stacks
properties.toolTip: Display and manipulate LiveCode's own windows in Application Overview and other lists

1020.#name: button "Context menus work on Rev dev stacks"

properties.label: Contextual menus work in LiveCode windows
properties.name: Context menus work on Rev dev stacks
properties.toolTip: Command-Control-Shift-click to display contextual menus in LiveCode's own windows

properties.label: Arrow keys navigate through cards
properties.name: navigation arrows
properties.toolTip: Right and left arrows go to next and previous cards (navigationArrows property)

properties.label: In LiveCode UI windows
properties.name: UI edit script
properties.toolTip: Script keypress also works in LiveCode's own windows

properties.label: Command-Option or Control-Alt click edits script
properties.name: opt edit script shortcut
properties.toolTip: Press the keys while the pointer is over an object to open the object's script

1024.#name: group "Options in Properties palettes are labeled with:"

properties.label: Name of LiveCode property
properties.name: Language names on properties
properties.toolTip: Programmer-friendly, easier to adjust in a script

properties.label: Description of option
properties.name: Descriptions on properties
properties.toolTip: Beginner-friendly, easier to read

properties.name: Options in Properties palettes are labeled with:

properties.label: Choose...
properties.name: Image Editor...
properties.toolTip: Choose an application to open images in when you click "Launch Editor" in the image's Properties palette

properties.name: http proxy
properties.toolTip: IP address that HTTP requests are transmitted through (leave empty to send requests directly to the host system)

properties.label: Load Start Center when last user stack is closed
properties.name: ReloadStartCenter

properties.label: Reset All Preferences to Defaults
properties.name: Reset Preferences to Defaults
properties.toolTip: Resets all preferences to the default values.

properties.label: Add .livecode extension when saving files on MacOS
properties.name: add extension

properties.label: destroyStack property is set to true for new stacks
properties.name: destroyStack
properties.toolTip: The destroyStack property closes a file when all its stack windows are closed

properties.htmlText: If destroyStack is false, when closing last stack in file:
properties.name: New Field 4

properties.label: Close the file
properties.name: Remove from memory
properties.toolTip: Override normal behavior and close the file anyway

properties.label: Ask
properties.name: Ask
properties.toolTip: Ask whether to close the file, leave it open, or cancel

properties.label: Don't close the file
properties.name: Don't remove
properties.toolTip: Leave file open and available in Application Overview

cREVTable.currentview: Number of recent files to store:

properties.label: Sort items by date last opened
properties.name: modification date

properties.label: Preserve stack file version on stacks saved in legacy format
properties.name: Preserve Stack Version
properties.toolTip: Preserves the stack file version of stacks that have been saved out in legacy format using Save As in the Revolution IDE

properties.label: Always use absolute file paths for images
properties.name: absoluteImagePaths
properties.toolTip: When importing a reference image, always use the absolute path to the image rather than the location relative to the stack file

properties.name: Choose Customization Path
properties.toolTip: Click to change the customization path. This is where user settings including externals and plugins are stored

properties.label: Pixels
properties.name: Rulers
properties.toolTip: Display of ruler units when you choose Rulers from the View menu

properties.name: gridSize
properties.toolTip: Increment for moving and resizing objects when Grid is turned on (gridSize property)

properties.label: Black
properties.name: backdrop color
properties.text:
Black
White
Red
Yellow
Blue
Green
(-
Other...
properties.toolTip: Color for backdrop when turned on (backdrop property)

properties.label: Gray50
properties.name: selectionhandle color
properties.text:
White
Gray50
Black
Red
Yellow
Blue
Green
(-
Other...
properties.toolTip: Color for square "handles" on selected objects (selectionHandleColor property)

properties.name: hypertext color
properties.text:
Aquamarine
Brown
CadetBlue
RoyalBlue
Gray
Sienna
(-
Other...
properties.toolTip: Color that glossary terms become when the mouse pointer is over them

properties.name: cScrollbarWidth
properties.toolTip: Width of scrollbars on all systems, in pixels

properties.name: cMacOSScrollbarHeight
properties.toolTip: Height of scrollbars on MacOS systems, in pixels

properties.name: cMacOSProgressScrollbarHeight
properties.toolTip: Height of progress bars on MacOS systems, in pixels

properties.name: cScrollbarHeight
properties.toolTip: Height of scrollbars on Unix and Windows systems, in pixels

properties.htmlText: Use the following sizes when creating a new object:
properties.name: New Field 6

properties.label: Reset
properties.name: Reset Object Sizes
properties.toolTip: Resets all object sizes to the default.

properties.label: Source Code Pro
properties.name: Font
properties.toolTip: Font used in the editing field

properties.name: Font Size
properties.toolTip: Font size used in the editing field

properties.name: Auto Format
properties.toolTip:
The script editor will keep your code formatted as 
you type.

properties.label: Strict Compilation Mode
properties.name: Variable Checking
properties.toolTip:
The script editor will check that variables are declared and
literals are quoted when compiling.

properties.name: Variable Preservation
properties.toolTip:
Variables declared outside handlers ("script-locals") will
keep their values when scripts are edited and recompiled.

properties.name: Line Numbers
properties.toolTip: Show line numbers in the script editor

properties.name: Horizontal scroll
properties.toolTip: Show a horizontal scrollbar for wide scripts

properties.name: Interactive find
properties.toolTip: The script editor quick search will begin to find results as you are still typing

properties.name: Show globals
properties.toolTip: Show the values of all global variables in the variable watcher while debugging

properties.name: Print Font Size
properties.toolTip: Font size used when printing scripts

properties.name: Indentation
properties.toolTip: The number of spaces the script editor should use to indent lines of code

cREVTable.currentview: Please Note:  When using single column view only the keyword column will be visible.

properties.htmlText: Please Note: When using single column view only the keyword column will be visible.
properties.name: N.B
default profile name
properties.toolTip: Enter a name for the default profile

properties.label: Create profiles automatically
properties.name: Create profiles automatically
properties.toolTip: If you switch to a nonexistent profile, create that profile with current settings

properties.label: Don't save settings when switching profiles
properties.name: Don't save changes
properties.toolTip: Use this option to save time when changes to object properties don't need to be saved in the current profile

properties.name: Download Now
properties.toolTip: Download and install the Legacy drivers to make them available for use

properties.htmlText: The Database library and drivers were changed in version 2.9. This may have caused problems with some applications. Click the download button to obtain and use the legacy drivers from version 2.8.1.
properties.name: Label

customproperties.cLegacyDriversNotPresentText: The Database library and drivers were changed in version 2.9. This may have caused problems with some applications. Click the download button to obtain and use the legacy drivers from version 2.8.1.
customproperties.cLegacyDriversPresentText: Select this option to use the Database library and drivers from version 2.8.1. The legacy drivers will be used both in the IDE and in standalone applications. Changes to this option will not take effect until Revolution has been restarted.
